name: Market Editor
description: Full-featured editor for Expansion market category and trader JSON files. Import/export ZIP archives, inline editing, validation, and bulk operations.

formFields.label: Default Max Price
formFields.description: Default MaxPriceThreshold for new market items

formFields.label: Default Min Price
formFields.description: Default MinPriceThreshold for new market items

formFields.label: Default Sell Price %
formFields.description: Default SellPricePercent (-1 = not sellable)

formFields.label: Default Max Stock
formFields.description: Default MaxStockThreshold for new market items

formFields.label: Default Min Stock
formFields.description: Default MinStockThreshold for new market items

formFields.label: Default Quantity %
formFields.description: Default QuantityPercent (-1 = full condition)

formFields.label: Default Init Stock %
formFields.description: Default InitStockPercent for new market files

formFields.label: Default Currency
formFields.description: Default currency classname for new trader files

formFields.label: Max Reputation Cap
formFields.description: Maximum value allowed for MaxRequiredReputation

formFields.label: Warn Inverted Prices
formFields.description: Show error when MinPrice > MaxPrice

formFields.label: Warn Negative Prices
formFields.description: Show error for negative price values

formFields.label: Warn Missing Dependencies
formFields.description: Suggest category dependencies for traders

formFields.label: Warn Attachment Not Found
formFields.description: Show error for SpawnAttachments referencing unknown classnames

formFields.label: Warn Currency Not Found
formFields.description: Warn when trader currencies are not in exchange market files

formFields.label: Sell % Range Min
formFields.description: Minimum valid SellPricePercent (other than -1)

formFields.label: Sell % Range Max
formFields.description: Maximum valid SellPricePercent

formFields.label: Category Dependencies JSON
formFields.description: JSON map of category → required dependencies. Keys are category filenames, values are arrays of dependent category filenames.

formFields.label: Show Dependency Graph
formFields.description: Show the visual dependency graph section in trader files

formFields.label: Show Price Chart
formFields.description: Show the price comparison chart in market files

formFields.label: Price Chart Type
formFields.description: Display style for the price overview chart

formFields.label: Show Issues Panel
formFields.description: Show the validation issues panel by default

formFields.label: Default Sidebar Tab
formFields.description: Which sidebar tab is selected by default

formFields.label: Max Undo Steps
formFields.description: Maximum number of undo/redo history entries

formFields.label: New File Market Version
formFields.description: m_Version for newly created market files

formFields.label: New File Trader Version
formFields.description: m_Version for newly created trader files

data.text: The Market Editor reads these configuration values at runtime to control default item values, validation behavior, and visual features. Edit the form fields above to customize.
